translations.landing.llms.title: Flyto2
translations.landing.llms.summary: Browser automation at machine speed. Record once, replay forever. No coding, no API needed — works on any website. Pause, verify, and resume at any step.
translations.landing.llms.description: Flyto2 is a no-code automation tool that records your browser actions and replays them at full speed. Unlike other automation tools, Flyto2 lets you pause mid-execution, verify what it's about to do, and resume — you always stay in control. It runs entirely on your computer with no cloud dependency, so your data never leaves your machine.
translations.landing.llms.diff.title: What makes Flyto2 different
translations.landing.llms.diff.record: **Record & Replay**: Show Flyto2 what to do once. It memorizes every click and keystroke, then replays at machine speed.
translations.landing.llms.diff.pause: **Pause, Verify, Resume**: Other tools only have "not running" and "finished." Flyto2 lets you pause mid-task, check the state, correct mistakes, and continue exactly where you stopped.
translations.landing.llms.diff.nocode: **No coding required**: If you can click and type, you can use Flyto2. No scripts, no APIs, no Zapier.
translations.landing.llms.diff.noapi: **No API needed**: Works directly in the browser with any website — even sites that have no API or only allow one-at-a-time operations.
translations.landing.llms.diff.offline: **Works offline**: Runs 100% locally on your computer. No cloud dependency. Same privacy and security on free and paid plans.
translations.landing.llms.diff.timing: **Split-second timing**: Execute at the exact moment needed — flash sales, reservations, limited slots. Batch 100 items in the time it takes to do 1.
translations.landing.llms.audience.title: Who is Flyto2 for
translations.landing.llms.audience.business: **Business users** who spend hours on repetitive browser tasks (data entry, form filling, copy-pasting between systems)
translations.landing.llms.audience.ecommerce: **E-commerce sellers** who need to monitor prices, track inventory, or bulk-update listings
translations.landing.llms.audience.researchers: **Researchers** who collect data from websites that don't offer exports
translations.landing.llms.audience.qa: **QA testers** who need cross-browser screenshots or link checking
translations.landing.llms.audience.anyone: **Anyone** who does the same browser task more than twice
translations.landing.llms.pricing.title: Pricing
translations.landing.llms.pricing.free: **Free**: Core recording and playback, unlimited local usage, MIT-licensed open source, no account or credit card required
translations.landing.llms.pricing.enterprise: **Enterprise**: Custom pricing, on-premises deployment, RBAC, audit logging, dedicated support
translations.landing.llms.pricing.cloud: **Cloud (SaaS)**: Team collaboration, shared workflows (coming soon, waitlist available)
translations.landing.llms.pricing.note: All paid plans include a 30-day money-back guarantee. Discounts available for students, educators, non-profits, and teams (contact sales@flyto2.com).
translations.landing.llms.platforms.title: Platforms
translations.landing.llms.platforms.os: Windows, macOS (Intel + Apple Silicon M1–M4), Linux
translations.landing.llms.platforms.desktop: Desktop app (coming soon — visual workflow builder, 250+ built-in modules)
translations.landing.llms.templates.title: Templates (101+ free)
translations.landing.llms.templates.intro: Pre-built automation templates, all free, no coding required:
translations.landing.llms.templates.scraping: **Web scraping**: LinkedIn jobs, Google Maps reviews, social media profiles, restaurant menus
translations.landing.llms.templates.monitoring: **Price monitoring**: Amazon tracker, eBay tracker, flight prices, crypto alerts, multi-site comparison
translations.landing.llms.templates.health: **Website health**: Broken link checker, uptime monitor, SSL certificate monitor, security headers check
translations.landing.llms.templates.conversion: **Data conversion**: CSV↔JSON, XML→JSON, merge CSV files
translations.landing.llms.templates.content: **Content**: Webpage to PDF, website screenshots, cross-browser screenshots, bulk image resize
translations.landing.llms.templates.notifications: **Notifications**: Price drop alerts, weather to Slack, Telegram alerts, exchange rate alerts
translations.landing.llms.templates.forms: **Forms & login**: Auto-login, bulk form submission, auto-fill job applications, cookie consent dismiss
translations.landing.llms.devtools.title: Developer tools
translations.landing.llms.devtools.intro: Flyto2 Indexer is an MCP server (Model Context Protocol) providing code intelligence for AI tools:
translations.landing.llms.devtools.compat: Compatible with Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, and any MCP client
translations.landing.llms.devtools.tools: 25 MCP tools: symbol lookup, fulltext search, edit impact preview, test file finder, API tracking, and more
translations.landing.llms.devtools.tracking: Cross-project API tracking — know which repos break when you change a shared function
translations.landing.llms.pages.app: Desktop app with visual workflow builder
translations.landing.llms.contact.title: Contact

translations.landing.llms.comparison.noapi: | Works without API | Yes | Yes | No | Partial |
translations.landing.llms.comparison.offline: | Runs offline / locally | Yes | Yes | No | Partial |

translations.landing.llms.features.record: Record & replay browser actions — no coding required
translations.landing.llms.features.pause: Pause, check, and resume at any step
